details.body:
## MPG Migration Review — Azure.ResourceManager.Confluent

### Phase 1: Versioning ✅
- Version `1.3.0-beta.1` — appropriate for new features
- `ApiCompatVersion: 1.2.1` — preserved
- No `ApiCompatBase

🔴 All new extensible enum types use ALL_UPPERCASE member names. This violates .NET naming conventions — enum members should be PascalCase.

Affected enums and their members:
- `AuthType`: `KAFKAAPIKEY
🟡 `Package` is an extremely generic name for an extensible enum — it provides no indication of which service or concept it belongs to. Same applies to `AuthType` (line 781) and `DataFormatType` (line

🟡 The `data` parameter for PUT operations should be **required**, not optional (`= null`). This applies to all new resource `CreateOrUpdate`/`Update` methods:
- `ConnectorResourceCollection.CreateOrUp

🟡 The name `ConnectorResourceData` (and `ConnectorResourceCollection`) has ""Resource"" in the middle, which is unusual for Data/Collection types. This happens because the TypeSpec resource is named `

details.body: The XML summary for Id is incorrect ('Type of cluster'). This is a backward-compat shim type meant for end users; please correct the summary to something like 'Cluster id.' to avoid confusing API docu

System.Runtime.CompilerServices and System.Threading are not used in this file. Removing unused using directives reduces noise and avoids potential analyzer warnings.
```suggestion

```

details.body: @msyyc, @ChenxiJiang333 can you please Review this PR

Hi @Shekar2004 Pls create a release plan instead of trigger pipeline to generate SDK pr directly. If you don't know how to make release plan, you could seek help in teams channel https://teams.microso

We have already created the release plan: https://apps.powerapps.com/play/e/ed2ffefd-774d-40dd-ab23-7fff01aeec9f/a/821ab569-ae60-420d-8264-d7b5d5ef734c?release-plan-id=946c92ae-4506-f111-8406-000d3a59
Hi @Shekar2004, it looks like the prerequisite's checks of sdk release haven't be finished for this release plan.
Thank you for pointing out the gap in release plan @ChenxiJiang333, Updated the release plan to complete the Prequisite checks. Please let me know if anything else need to be done too??
@Shekar2004, pr ready, feel free to merge and release
